permitted_bases.condition: reuse only when model, format, backend, artifact, binary, and metric identity hashes match exactly
capture source-vs-existing-active-AQ4 baseline before candidate execution; freeze quantiles and safety margin in policy
derive from predeclared weight/dequantization error analysis; never fit to candidate rows
candidate must not exceed the frozen active-AQ4-vs-BF16 envelope on the disjoint holdout

forbidden_bases: attempt2 observed rows or VRAM/power samples
candidate-selected rows, prompts, or M values
post-run threshold relaxation after a mismatch
historical values with a different identity
producer summary without independently validated payload
freeze_order: hash source checkpoint/tokenizer/cases and holdout split
capture and validate independent BF16 source plus existing active AQ4 baseline
choose metric definitions, aggregation, quantile, margin, and quality tasks
write and self-hash the bound policy
evaluate only against the frozen policy

required_evidence: hash-bound disjoint tuning and evaluation holdouts
existing active AQ4 all-M=1 source baseline
candidate optimized result and source/path comparison artifacts
quality-task evaluation with fixed prompts, tokenizer, sampling, and scoring
validator_tests: reject policy if any threshold is null, changed after candidate run, or not hash-bound
reject source holdout overlap with tuning cases
reject candidate/path greedy, top-k, context, or state mismatch
reject source/path/candidate identity or case swap
reject missing full-vector metrics, nonfinite rows, and partial matrices
reject attempt2 digest or producer summary as a threshold source
accept diagnostic attempt2 artifact only as observed-values-only evidence
rejection_criteria: any unexpected fallback, OOM, state reset failure, or lifecycle mismatch
source fidelity metric beyond frozen threshold
quality task regression beyond frozen non-regression rule
missing or changed identity, holdout, power, or policy hash

active_path_exact_no_regression: all-M=1 exact greedy sequence and ordered top-k at every committed step
exact context/input hash, KV/cache lengths, positions, scheduler ownership, and reset
no new fallback/OOM and no production worker contract change
source_fidelity: meet frozen holdout token-agreement and top-k-overlap policy
meet frozen hidden/logit cosine and relative-L2 drift policy
performance: compare only same identity and power condition
do not trade correctness or exact path behavior for throughput
p3_candidate_requirements.promotion: blocked until the amended policy and independent validator are reviewed and bound
